reports.title: GitHub Wrapped
reports.query:
# GitHub Wrapped

Your annual GitHub activity in Neo4j graph form.

This dashboard shows:
- **Top Contributors** — who opened the most PRs
- **Top Reviewers** — who reviewed the most PRs
- **PR Merge Rate** — monthly PR merge trend
- **Hero Stats** — Great Deleter (most lines deleted) and Bug Slayer (most bug-label PRs)
- **Hottest Files** — most-touched files by PR count (requires TOUCHES rels imported)
- **Label Leaderboard** — which labels appear most on PRs

Use the tabs above to navigate between pages.

reports.title: Top Contributors (PRs Opened)
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(pr:PullRequest)
RETURN p.login AS Contributor, count(pr) AS PRsOpened
ORDER BY PRsOpened DESC
LIMIT 10

reports.title: Top Reviewers (Review Count)
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(pr:PullRequest)
RETURN p.login AS Reviewer, count(pr) AS Reviews
ORDER BY Reviews DESC
LIMIT 10

reports.title: PR Merge Rate Over Time (Monthly)
reports.query:
MATCH (pr:PullRequest)
WHERE pr.state = 'MERGED' AND pr.mergedAt IS NOT NULL
WITH date(pr.mergedAt) AS d
WITH toString(d.year) + '-' + right('0' + toString(d.month), 2) AS YearMonth,
     count(*) AS MergedPRs
RETURN YearMonth, MergedPRs
ORDER BY YearMonth ASC

reports.title: Great Deleter — Top Contributors by Lines Deleted
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(pr:PullRequest)
RETURN p.login AS Contributor,
       count(pr) AS PRsAuthored,
       sum(pr.deletions) AS LinesDeleted,
       sum(pr.additions) AS LinesAdded
ORDER BY LinesDeleted DESC
LIMIT 10

reports.title: Bug Slayer — Top Bug Fixers (Merged PRs with 'bug' label)
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(pr:PullRequest)-[:HAS_LABEL]->(l:Label {name: 'bug'})
WHERE pr.state = 'MERGED'
RETURN p.login AS Contributor, count(pr) AS BugsFixed
ORDER BY BugsFixed DESC
LIMIT 10

reports.title: Collaboration Pairs (Author + Reviewer on Same PRs)
reports.query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(pr:PullRequest)<-[:REVIEWED]-(reviewer:Person)
WHERE author <> reviewer
RETURN author.login AS Author, reviewer.login AS Reviewer, count(pr) AS SharedPRs
ORDER BY SharedPRs DESC
LIMIT 20

reports.title: Hottest Files (by Distinct PRs Touching Them)
reports.query:
MATCH (pr:PullRequest)-[:TOUCHES]->(f:File)
RETURN f.path AS FilePath, count(DISTINCT pr) AS PRCount
ORDER BY PRCount DESC
LIMIT 10

reports.title: Label Distribution (PRs per Label)
reports.query:
MATCH (pr:PullRequest)-[:HAS_LABEL]->(l:Label)
RETURN l.name AS Label, count(pr) AS PRCount
ORDER BY PRCount DESC
LIMIT 15

reports.title: PR Velocity — Avg Hours to Merge by Author (min 5 merged PRs)
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(pr:PullRequest)
WHERE pr.state = 'MERGED'
  AND pr.mergedAt IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.createdAt IS NOT NULL
WITH p.login AS Author,
     avg(duration.inSeconds(pr.createdAt, pr.mergedAt).seconds / 3600.0) AS AvgHoursToMerge,
     count(pr) AS MergedPRs
WHERE MergedPRs >= 5
RETURN Author,
       round(AvgHoursToMerge, 1) AS AvgHoursToMerge,
       MergedPRs
ORDER BY AvgHoursToMerge ASC
LIMIT 10
